=Double Danish Gambit Accepted=
This time White has to recapture the pawn with '''[[/5. Bxb2|5. Bxb2]]''' rather than give Black a second queen. (The sacrifice Bxf7 is an important idea in the Double Danish Accepted, just not yet.)

title: Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. d4/2...exd4/3. c3/3...dxc3/4. Bc4/4...cxb2
